title: How do I configure a custom GPIO pin for the LED in the wizard?
body: Hey! Quick question — using the browser wizard for an ESP32-C3 project. The default LED is on GPIO 8 but my board has the LED on GPIO 2. I clicked around the wizard but couldn't find where to change the pin assignment. Can someone point me at the right setting? Thanks!
_notes: Pure usage question; should redirect to Discussions/Q&A per ADR-002. AI may also answer inline if it's trivial.
